0.text: Peribronchial thickening in the central portions of both lungs, most notably in the lower lobes

1.text: Ground glass opacities in the left lower lobe anteromediobasal segment

2.text: Subcentimeter centrilobular nodules in the left lower lobe anteromediobasal segment

3.text: Nodular ground glass opacities in the subpleural region of the right middle lobe medial segment anteriorly

4.text: Nodular ground glass opacities in the subpleural region of the left lower lobe laterobasal segment

5.text: Nodule with slightly irregular borders, measuring approximately 9.5 mm in diameter, in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe

6.text: Increased linear density in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe, suggestive of fibrotic changes

7.text: Changes consistent with fibrosis in bilateral apical regions of the lungs

8.text: Several subcentimeter nonspecific nodules within both lungs
